subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Powerful over whatsoever He willeth. Through His sovereignty He sendeth down that which is the Water of Life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المقتدر علی ما یشاء ینزل بسلطانه ما یکون ماء الحیوان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God
